hook: Discernment means reading patterns early instead of arguing with them later.
body: People tell you a lot through consistency, respect, and responsiveness before they ever state intentions clearly.

hook: Hope can make obvious patterns look temporary when they are actually the main story.
body: Believe repeated behavior faster than seductive explanations.

body: Someone who repeatedly leaves you confused is giving you information, even if the chemistry keeps distracting you.
